=== bd94-07-21-raw-LB-2990.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 7/21/94, Dresden, Germany, 2CDR

LB-2990, (51min+54min), Taper: no information; raw; same recording as previous version based on brief talking d1t1 6:2x; that version had levels raised and fade in done at begin of d1t1 and possibly some sound processing was done since treble and midrange were not raised as much; this recording is a little harsh and has clipping even though levels are low for example ar d2t5 2:09; excellent sound [A-]

DISK 1 ----- 50:17, 1. Jokerman, 2. Just Like A Woman, 3. All Along The Watchtower, 4. Every Grain Of Sand, 5. Tangled Up In Blue, 6. Watching The River Flow, 7. Mr. Tambourine Man, DISK 2 ----- 53:49, 1. Masters Of War, 2. Love Minus Zero/No Limit, 3. God Knows, 4. Joey (Bob Dylan, Jacques Levy/Bob Dylan), 5. Maggie's Farm, 6. Ballad Of A Thin Man, 7. It Ain't Me, Babe

Please retain this info file and its LB number as a marker for this lossless set
and if you spread it please list it in the description to avoid others getting duplicates
